name: LLM (CLI Tool and Python Library for LLMs)

auth.notes: llm keys set openai APIKEY; supports many providers via plugins

performance.notes: LLM provider dependent; streaming output by default

agent_readiness.notes: CLI tool + Python library for LLMs by Simon Willison. llm 'Hello world'. llm -m claude-3-haiku. echo 'text' | llm 'summarize'. llm logs (SQLite history). Plugins: llm-anthropic, llm-ollama, llm-gemini, llm-gpt4all, 50+ models. Embeddings: llm embed. Templates for reusable prompts. Python API: llm.get_model('claude-3.5-sonnet').prompt('hello'). Perfect for shell scripting with LLMs. logs stored in SQLite for history/analysis.

gotchas: Model names differ per provider plugin
Not for production app integration (use provider SDK directly)
SQLite log storage grows unbounded without cleanup
best_when: Shell scripts and terminal workflows using LLMs
Quick LLM queries from the command line
Piping file contents through LLM for summarization/analysis
summary: LLM is Simon Willison's CLI tool and Python library for interacting with any LLM. llm 'prompt', llm -m claude-3-haiku, pipe text through. 50+ model plugins (Anthropic, Ollama, Gemini, GPT4All). SQLite log of all conversations. Templates for reusable prompts. Embeddings support. Perfect for shell scripting and personal LLM workflows. Use provider SDKs for production applications.
